summary: This PR adds a minimal in-memory token-bucket rate limiter as an example (`examples/token_bucket.py`). The `TokenBucket` class accepts a capacity and refill rate, then tracks per-key token counts in a plain dict; refill is computed lazily at check time (no background thread) and there is no eviction. The design is intentionally simple and scoped to single-process use, serving as a readable reference implementation rather than a production-grade utility.
